export const COINS = [
  { sym: 'BTC',  name: 'Bitcoin',   emoji: '₿',  basePrice: 67420, change: 2.34  },
  { sym: 'ETH',  name: 'Ethereum',  emoji: '⟠',  basePrice: 3512,  change: 1.87  },
  { sym: 'SOL',  name: 'Solana',    emoji: '◎',  basePrice: 178.4, change: -0.92 },
  { sym: 'BNB',  name: 'BNB',       emoji: '◆',  basePrice: 412.3, change: 0.54  },
  { sym: 'XRP',  name: 'XRP',       emoji: '◈',  basePrice: 0.624, change: -1.23 },
  { sym: 'ADA',  name: 'Cardano',   emoji: '₳',  basePrice: 0.482, change: 3.21  },
  { sym: 'AVAX', name: 'Avalanche', emoji: '▲',  basePrice: 38.6,  change: -2.1  },
  { sym: 'DOT',  name: 'Polkadot',  emoji: '●',  basePrice: 7.84,  change: 1.42  },
  { sym: 'LINK', name: 'Chainlink', emoji: '⬡',  basePrice: 18.2,  change: 0.88  },
  { sym: 'DOGE', name: 'Dogecoin',  emoji: '🐕', basePrice: 0.132, change: -0.45 },
];

export const BOTS = [
  { id: 'trend',  name: 'TrendFollower Pro',  desc: 'EMA + MACD tabanlı trend takip',          successRate: 78, trades: '1.2K', color: '#00f5a0' },
  { id: 'rsi',    name: 'RSI Scalper',         desc: 'Aşırı alım/satım bölgelerini avlar',      successRate: 71, trades: '3.4K', color: '#00d4ff' },
  { id: 'bb',     name: 'Bollinger Breakout',  desc: 'Bant kırılımlarından yararlanır',         successRate: 74, trades: '892',  color: '#ffaa00' },
  { id: 'hybrid', name: 'Hybrid AI Bot',       desc: 'Tüm indikatörleri birleştirir (önerilen)', successRate: 82, trades: '654',  color: '#ff6b9d' },
];

export const TIMEFRAMES = [
  { label: '1S', value: '1h' },
  { label: '4S', value: '4h' },
  { label: '1G', value: '1d' },
  { label: '1H', value: '1w' },
];
